changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(scripts): add auto-commit for workspace changes after record-session — journal/index changes are now automatically committed, keeping the working directory clean
- feat(scripts): add `.feature/config.yaml` for project-level settings (session_commit_message, max_journal_lines)
- feat(scripts): add `--no-commit` flag to `add_session.py` to skip auto-commit
- feat(scripts): add `common/config.py` module for reading config.yaml with sensible defaults
- feat(templates): update all 8 platform record-session templates with auto-commit documentation
notes: Run `feature update` to sync new files (config.yaml, config.py) and updated templates.
